Event description EN: No hot water. Actuator (DHW system) replaced.
Fault label: Motorised control valve (primary side): Actuator defective

Event description EN: Control parameters updated.
Pump settings updated.
Fault label: Failure of the heating circuit pump

Event description EN: The heaters are not getting warm enough. Supply temperature is 44°C at 9°C outdoor temperature. Heating curve increased.
The needle valve was closed. Readjusted.
Fault label: Incorrect setting of the differential pressure regulator

Event description EN: Leakage at joint present. Seal replaced, system back in operation.
Control apparently defective/non-functional. Motorised control valve heating seems defective.
Fault label: Motorised control valve (primary side): Actuator defective

Event description EN: Insufficient heat in the building system; heating circuit 1 shows no cooling and control limits primary side return temperature, probably short circuit in the connected object. Heating circuit 2 is not receiving sufficient volume flow. The pump output has therefore been increased.
Fault label: Failure of the heating circuit pump

Event description EN: Secondary heating pump behind storage tank was set to maximum speed. Pump adjusted. Storage tank is being refilled.
Fault label: Failure of the domestic hot water storage charging pump

Event description EN: Presumably, so much water was added from the other side that the safety valve on the system opened and flooded the basement.
Fault label: Safety relief valve: Water loss, does not close properly

Event description EN: Flow temperature too low and increased.
The pressure of the heating pump was reduced and switched to auto-adapt.
Fault label: Failure of the heating circuit pump

Event description EN: Motor control valve does not open.
Fault label: Motorised control valve (primary side): Control valve jams when closed

Event description EN: Flow temperature too low and increased to 55°C.
Several warning messages keep appearing: ‘Alarm leak sensor’. Sensor is probably defective.
Radiator heats up too slowly. Heating curve increased.
Externally controlled, supply temperature limited to 55°C.
Needle valve was set too tight and impuls line vented. Water flow normal again.
Fault label: Incorrect setting of the differential pressure regulator

Event description EN: Heating safety valve replaced.
Fault label: Safety relief valve: Water loss, does not close properly

Event description EN: No hot water. Thermostat defective and replaced.
Leak in the heat exchanger. All four screw connections on the heat exchanger tightened.
Malfunction in the circulation pump. Heating failed. Pump was blocked and was replaced.
Fault label: Failure of the heating circuit pump

Event description EN: The DHW controller was set to night mode. Reset to automatic.
Optimization of controller parameters led to insufficient supply for heating. Control system reset. Air in circulation for DHW, vented.
Circulation line was blocked, has been reopened.
Differential pressure regulator made operational again.
No heat and hot water below 60°C! Heat curve parameters increased.
Only 40 °C heating supply. Heating curve increased. Controller now reaches 62 degrees supply.
Control parameters updated (increased flow temperature).
Differential pressure regulator defective and replaced.
Strainer leaking. Sealed.
Flow temperature 60 degrees, return temperature 28 degrees; water was only slighlty warm. Defective DHW control valve replaced.
System checked electrically and mechanically. No defects found.
